title: Column cache problem with aggregate queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32), name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(value) > 1);
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'Test%';
key_bug_features: Column cache issue in aggregate queries
